history.detail: Quarantined: ask_message_repeat examples cluster with casual_engagement thanks at ME5 embedding level (gs_085 "Thanks" wrongly matched at 0.878). Quality grader passed but per-topic golden eval surfaced false-positive issue. Reactivation requires example refinement to disambiguate from cg_thanks.
